from source import to_base

def test_to_base_reversed_digits_bug():
    # The bug: digits are appended in wrong order (result + alphabet[i] instead of alphabet[i] + result)
    # This causes to_base(31, 16) to return 'F1' instead of '1F'
    assert to_base(31, 16) == '1F', f"Expected '1F', got '{to_base(31, 16)}'"
